name: 1 Dough 5 Cookies
instructions: 1. Yumurta ve tereyağını derin ve geniş bir kaba alıp karıştırın.
2.  Üzerine pudra şekeri, nişasta, kabartma tozu ve vanilini ilave ederek tekrar karıştırın ve unu bardak bardak ekleyerek toparlanan bir hamur elde edene kadar yoğurun.
3. Toparlanan hamuru iki parçaya ayırın ve ilkine kakao ekleyip iyice yoğurun.
4.  Kahve çekirdeği şeklindeki kurabiyeler için cevizden biraz daha ufak parçalar kopartın.
5.  Elinizde yuvarlayarak oval şekillendirdiğiniz kurabiyeleri 2-3 cm aralıklarla yağlı kağıt serilmiş fırın tepsisine dizin.
6.  Bir çöp şiş, kürdan ya da bıçak sırtı yardımıyla kurabiyelerin üzerine bastırarak uzunlamasına bir çizgi yapın.
7. Tutku kurabiyeler için fındık büyüklüğünde 3 kakaolu 3 sade hamuru çiçek gibi olacak şekilde dizin ve elinizde hafifçe yuvarlayın.
8. Diğer kurabiyeler için ister parmak şekli isterseniz minik toplar yaparak çatalla şekillendirin.
9. Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derecedeki fırında 10-12 dakika kadar pişirin.
10.  Oda sıcaklığına gelinceye kadar tepside dinlendirin ve isteğe göre eritilmiş çikolataya batırıp dinlendirerek servis edin.

name: 100% Fruit "cake
instructions: To create the base tier of the cake, cut 3 slices of watermelon, 1 to 2 inches thick, crossways through the center of the melon.
Trim the rind from the watermelon slices, and place the largest slice onto a cake plate.
Alternate layering sliced strawberries, slices of cantaloupe, and slices of fresh pineapple; follow with the second-largest watermelon slice.
Repeat once more to make a layered fruit stack that looks like a cake.
Thinly slice a few pieces of remaining melon and pineapple.
With cookie cutters or a sharp knife, cut remaining fruit slices into decorative shapes.
Decorate the cake tiers with the cut fruit shapes and remaining berries.
Refrigerate until serving time.
To serve, slice the cake with a sharp knife, one wedge at a time, and set the wedge onto a plate.

name: 15 Bean Soup

ingredients.prep: peeled and chopped, or more to taste

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place bean soup mix (without seasoning packet) into a large container and cover with several inches of cool water; let stand 8 hours to overnight. Strain and rinse.

Heat olive oil in a stockpot over medium heat. Add onion and sauté until golden brown, 15 to 20 minutes. Add carrots, mushrooms, celery, kale, chard, and garlic; cook and stir until carrots and mushrooms are slightly tender, 5 to 10 minutes.
Pour broth over vegetable mixture and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat and add bay leaves, rosemary, basil, salt, and pepper. Add strained beans and simmer until are softened, 1 ½ to 2 hours.

name: 2 Cheese Omelette Recipe
instructions: 1. Yumurtaları uygun bir kaseye alın ve çırpın.
2. Sütü, rendelenmiş beyaz peyniri, ince kıyılmış dereotunu, tuzu ve karabiberi ekleyin, karıştırın.
3. Tavayı ocağa alın, tereyağını ekleyip eritin.
4. Omlet harcını tavaya dökün ve eşit şekilde yayın.
5. Orta ateşte alt yüzü pişene kadar pişirin.
6. Omletin üzerine bir kapak veya tabak kapatın, omleti dikkatlice çevirin ve diğer yüzünü de pişirin.
7. Omletin üzerine rendelenmiş kaşar peynirini serpiştirin.
8. Omleti servis tabağına alın, dikkatlice rulo şeklinde sarın ve sıcak servis edin.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

name: 2 Chocolate Cake
instructions: Unte uma forma com margarina e polvilhe-a com farinha. Reserve. Ligue o forno a 180 graus.
Parta ambos os chocolates em pedaços e coloque-os em tigelas separadas. Leve as tigelas ao lume, em banho-maria, e deixe os chocolates derreterem. Retire do lume e reserve.
Numa tigela à parte, bata muito bem a manteiga com o açúcar. Adicione depois os ovos, batendo sempre. Acrescente o fermento e a farinha e continue a bater muito bem.

Divida a massa em duas tigelas e envolva um chocolate derretido a cada uma delas. Disponha na forma a massa de chocolate negro e depois a massa de chocolate branco. Leve ao forno durante 35 minutos, retire, desenforme e deixe arrefecer. Polvilhe com açúcar em pó e sirva.

name: 2 Chocolate Cookies
instructions: Pique os chocolates em pedaços. Numa taça, coloque a manteiga e o açúcar e bata bem. Adicione o ovo e continue a bater até obter um creme homogéneo.De seguida acrescente a farinha e os chocolates e envolva bem.
Disponha colheradas de massa num tabuleiro de forno, forrado com papel vegetal e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, durante 15 a 20 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer e sirva.

name: 2 Delicious Antioxidant Detox Juices

ingredients.item: ½ taza de uvas rojas sin semilla

instructions: Inicia tu receta y agrega las uvas rojas sin semilla, las frambuesas y los arándanos.
Luego, vierte la taza de agua fría y las dos cucharadas de linaza.
Ahora, licúa muy bien hasta que se procese todo y no quede grumos. Te quedará una textura densa y rojiza.
Sirve a temperatura ambiente y degusta.

name: 2-color Pudding
instructions: Num tacho, coloque o leite, as gemas, o leite condensado, a manteiga, a farinha maisena e as natas. Leve ao lume e deixe cozinhar, em lume brando, mexendo sempre até engrossar.
Divida a mistura anterior por duas tigelas. Numa delas, deite a essência de baunilha e mexa. Na outra, coloque o chocolate em pó e envolva também.

Numa forma de pudim, coloque o creme de baunilha e depois uma camada de bolachas de chocolate trituradas. Deite por cima o creme de chocolate e finalize com as bolachas de aveia igualmente trituradas. Leve ao frio de um dia para o outro. No dia seguinte, desenforme e sirva.

name: 20 Creepy And Fun Halloween Cookies
original_name: 20 galletas de Halloween horripilantes y divertidas

ingredients.item: 250 g de harina de trigo de todo uso
125 g de mantequilla sin sal (a temperatura ambiente)

instructions: El primer paso es batir los 125 g mantequilla blanda con los 125 g de azúcar glas hasta que la mezcla esté cremosa y casi blanca.
Después, añade el huevo y una cucharadita de extracto de vainilla, y sigue batiendo hasta que se integren.

Por último, añade los 250 g de harina y la pizca de sal (tamizadas, si es posible). Mezcla solo hasta que la harina desaparezca y se forme una bola. No amases demasiado, ¡es la clave para que no se queden duras!
Una vez tienes la masa, aplánala un poco, envuélvela en papel film y a la nevera. El reposo es obligatorio, créeme, mínimo una hora.
Luego, extiéndela con un rodillo (unos 5 mm de grosor) y corta tus figuras con los cortadores elegidos, colocando luego sobre una bandeja de horno con papel vegetal.
Precalienta el horno a 180ºC y hornea las galletas de 8 a 12 minutos. Sabrás que están listas cuando los bordes empiecen a verse dorados.

Una vez frías ya puedes decorarlas con glaseado de diferentes colores utilizando una manga pastelera. Para hacerlo debes primero seguir la línea de las galletas o la silueta, y una vez se endurezca ligeramente puedes rellenar el interior, extendiendo con un palillo. Según tu habilidad y experiencia puedes hacer decoraciones más o menos elaboradas.

Como puedes ver, en este caso las galletas llevan una decoración bastante sencilla que cualquiera puede hacer, incluidos los niños con vuestra ayuda. Ya solo te queda decorarlas y servirlas la noche más terrorífica del año.

name: 3 Color Cake
instructions: Bata o açúcar com a manteiga amolecida. Junte os ovos um a um, batendo sempre. Adicione depois o leite e, por fim, a farinha e o fermento.
Divida a massa em três partes. Numa delas, adicione um pouco de cacau em pó, noutra algumas gotas de corante vermelho e, à terceira, não adicione nada.
Deite as massas, alternadamente, numa forma untada e polvilhada com farinha. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 175ºc, durante 30 minutos ou até o palito sair seco. Retire, deixe arrefecer e desenforme.

name: 3 Egg Carrot Walnut Cinnamon Cake Recipe
original_name: 3 Yumurtalı Havuçlu Cevizli Tarçınlı Kek Tarifi

ingredients.item: 1 su bardağından biraz fazla sıvı yağ
Yumurta boyutu küçükse 1 adet fazla kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha süngerimsi bir doku için yumurta aklarını ayrı çırpıp son aşamada ekleyebilirsiniz.
Esmer şeker kullanarak daha yoğun ve karamelimsi bir aroma elde edebilirsiniz.
Şeker miktarını azaltarak daha az tatlı bir kek yapabilirsiniz.
Yarım sıvı yağ + yarım eritilmiş tereyağı kullanabilirsiniz.
Zeytinyağı tercih ederek daha aromatik bir lezzet elde edebilirsiniz.
Süt yerine yoğurt kullanarak daha yoğun ve nemli bir doku yakalayabilirsiniz.
Laktozsuz süt veya bitkisel sütler (badem, yulaf) da kullanılabilir.
Yarım beyaz un + yarım tam buğday unu kullanarak daha tok tutan bir kek hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Unun bir kısmını yulaf unu ile değiştirerek lif oranını artırabilirsiniz.
Havuç miktarını artırarak daha nemli bir kek elde edebilirsiniz.
İnce rendelenmiş elma ekleyerek farklı bir aroma yakalayabilirsiniz.
Cevizi iri bırakmak kekte daha belirgin bir doku sağlar.
Tarçına ek olarak muskat veya zencefil ekleyebilirsiniz.
Baharat miktarını damak zevkinize göre ayarlayabilirsiniz.
Vanilya özütü kullanarak daha doğal bir aroma elde edebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Yumurta ve toz şekeri derin bir kapta açık renk alana kadar çırpın.
2. Sıvı yağ ve sütü ekleyip karıştırmaya devam edin.
3. Rendelenmiş havucu ilave edip spatula ile karıştırın.
4. Un, kabartma tozu, vanilin ve tarçını eleyerek ekleyin.
5. Son olarak cevizleri ekleyip homojen olacak şekilde karıştırın.
6. Yağlanmış ve unlanmış kek kalıbına harcı dökün.
7. Önceden ısıtılmış 170–175°C fırında yaklaşık 40–45 dakika pişirin.
8. Fırından çıkan keki kalıbında 10 dakika dinlendirdikten sonra çıkarın ve servis edin.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

name: 3-cheese Garlic Bread
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200°C).
In a bowl, combine all of the ingredients except the baguette, and mix until smooth.
Slice the baguette in half lengthwise, then spread the butter mixture evenly on both sides of the baguette.
Place on a tray lined with parchment paper and bake for about 15 minutes, until cheese is bubbly and starting to brown on the edges.
Slice, cool, then serve.

name: 3-chile Harissa
instructions: Place árbol, guajillo, and ancho chiles in a large heatproof measuring glass. Pour boiling water over to submerge, cover with plastic wrap, and let sit until chiles are very pliable and cool enough to handle, 15–20 minutes. Drain; remove stems and seeds and discard (wear gloves for this part if you have them).

Toast cumin and coriander in a dry small skillet over medium-low heat, tossing constantly, until very fragrant, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a food processor, add garlic, and pulse until spices are broken up and garlic forms a paste. Add chiles and pulse until chiles form a coarse paste. Add lemon juice, vinegar, tomato paste, paprika, and salt and process until mostly smooth but mixture still has a little texture. With the motor running, stream in ½ cup oil. Process until oil is incorporated.
Transfer harissa to a bowl. Pour remaining ¼ cup oil over top.
Harissa can be made 1 month ahead. Cover and chill.

name: 3bc ( Baked Bean Casserole)
instructions: Preheat an oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Melt butter in a large skillet over low heat. Add onion and cook until soft and translucent, 10 to 15 minutes. Transfer to a 2-quart casserole dish and set aside. Cook bacon in the same skillet over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain bacon on a paper towel-lined plate. Cut bacon into bite-sized pieces and set aside.

Combine baked beans, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, and mustard in the casserole dish. Stir in 2/3 cooked bacon and 1/4 brown sugar until mixture is combined. Top bean mixture with remaining bacon and sprinkle with remaining brown sugar.
Bake in the preheated oven until hot and bubbly, about 45 minutes.

name: 40-clove Garlic Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C). Place a sheet of foil on a small baking sheet and line another baking sheet with parchment paper.

Cut ½ inch off the tops of the garlic heads and place on the baking sheet with the foil. Drizzle the garlic with the olive oil and season with 1 teaspoon salt and the black pepper. Place the tops back on each garlic bulb. Bring up the corners of the foil around the garlic, then roll closed to form a tight packet. Place in the oven and roast until the garlic is caramelized, about 45 minutes. Remove from the oven and let sit for 30 minutes, until cool enough to handle. Leave the oven on.
Unwrap the foil packet and squeeze the heads to release the roasted garlic cloves into a medium bowl. Mash with a fork until a thick paste forms (some chunks are okay).
Add the butter, parsley, oregano, and remaining ½ teaspoon salt and stir to combine.

Using a serrated knife, carefully cut the bread into 1-inch-thick (2.54 cm) slices, stopping ½ inch (1.24 cm) from the bottom of the loaf to keep intact. Turn the loaf 90° and repeat cutting in the opposite direction.
Place the loaf on the parchment-lined baking sheet and stuff the mozzarella between the bread slices. Spread the roasted garlic butter over the entire loaf.
Place the loaf into the oven and bake until the cheese is melted and the top of the loaf is golden brown and crispy, 25–30 minutes.
Remove the loaf from the oven and transfer to a serving platter. Grate the Parmesan cheese directly over the top. Serve hot.
Enjoy!

name: 40-clove Garlic Chicken
instructions: Pre-heat the oven to 180°C (177°C)
Season the chicken with the salt, pepper and mixed herbs. Set aside.
Heat some oil in a large pan and sear the chicken for about 10-15 minutes evenly on each side, until golden brown.
Take the chicken out and set aside.
Add the shallots and cook down in the remaining juices for about 5 minutes over a low-medium heat.
Add the garlic cloves and gently cook them for about 2 minutes.
Pour in the vermouth or white wine and gently cook so that it reduces slightly.
Add the chicken, parsley sprigs and tarragon, followed by the chicken stock.
Bake in the oven for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve with crusty bread and vegetables of your choice.
Enjoy!

name: 5-grain Porridge With Bee Pollen, Apples, And Coconut

ingredients.item: Flaky sea salt (such as maldon) and bee pollen
Bee pollen is available at health food stores

instructions: Bring brown rice, quinoa, amaranth, millet, wheat bran, salt, and 6 cups water to a boil in a medium pot. Reduce heat, partially cover, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until cereal is the consistency of porridge (softer and thicker than the usual bowl of oatmeal) and water is absorbed, 40–50 minutes.
DO AHEAD: Porridge can be made 5 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.
Heat coconut oil in a medium skillet over medium-high. Cook coconut flakes, stirring often, until toasted, 2 minutes; transfer to a plate.
Add apple, cinnamon, and 2 Tbsp. honey to skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until apples are browned in spots and tender, about 3 minutes.
Serve porridge topped with apples, coconut, sea salt, bee pollen, and a drizzle of honey, if you like.

name: 50 Clove Garlic Knots
instructions: Make the dough: In the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the hook attachment, add the water, sugar, 3 tablespoons olive oil, flour, yeast, and salt. Mix on low speed until the dough starts to come together. Increase speed to medium and knead for 7-10 minutes, until the dough is soft and elastic. The dough should spring back when touched.
Grease a clean large bowl with the remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil. Add the dough, cover the bowl, and let rise in a warm place for about 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
Meanwhile, preheat the oven to 191°C (190°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Divide the dough into 18 equal pieces. Working one at a time, roll each piece into an 8-inch log. Tie each log into a knot, tuck the 2 ends underneath, and place on the prepared baking sheet.
Use a pastry brush to lightly brush each knot with olive oil. Bake in the preheated oven for about 15 minutes, or until golden brown on top.

While the knots are baking, make the garlic butter: Melt the butter in a large high-sided skillet over medium heat. Add the garlic and cook for about 5 minutes, or until fragrant and softened. Stir often to prevent burning.
Transfer garlic butter to a large mixing bowl. Let cool slightly, then stir in the Parmesan cheese, parsley, and salt until combined.
Remove the knots from the oven. Let cool slightly, then transfer them to the garlic butter mixture. Toss until evenly coated and serve immediately.
Enjoy!

name: 50 Garlic Clove Potatoes Au Gratin
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C). Grease an 8x8-inch square baking dish with nonstick cooking spray.

Use a sharp knife to cut off the tops of the garlic heads and place them cut-side up on a large piece of foil. Drizzle the exposed garlic cloves with olive oil and season with salt. Bring up the corners of the foil around the garlic, then roll closed to form a tight packet. Place the packet on a baking sheet and roast in the preheated oven for about 45 minutes, or until the garlic is caramelized. Remove from the oven and let sit for about 15 minutes, or until cool enough to handle.

Unwrap the foil packet and squeeze the heads to release the roasted garlic cloves into an upright blender. Add the half-and-half, heavy cream, and cream cheese, followed by ½ cup Gruyère, ½ cup cheddar, 2 tablespoons Parmesan, and ½ teaspoon kosher salt. Blend until the sauce is smooth.
Arrange the sliced potatoes in even rows in the prepared baking dish.
Pour the sauce over the potatoes, making sure to get in between the potato slices.
Evenly top the potatoes with the remaining ½ cup Gruyère, ½ cup cheddar, and 2 tablespoons Parmesan. Season with thyme and freshly ground black pepper.
Cover the baking dish with foil and bake in the preheated oven for 40 minutes. Remove the foil and cook for another 15-20 minutes, until the potatoes are tender and the cheese is evenly browned.
Let cool slightly, then garnish with chives to serve.
Enjoy!

name: 50 Garlic Clove Shrimp Scampi
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a rapid boil. Add the pasta and cook until al dente. Reserve about 1 cup of the pasta water then drain into a colander and set aside.
Pat the shrimp dry with paper towels and generously season with creole seasoning.
Heat olive oil in a large stick over medium heat. Add the shrimp and cook until about 1 to 2 minutes per side, or until they just begin to turn pink. Remove the shrimp and set aside.
Add butter to the skillet the shrimp was cooked in. Once the butter is melted, add the minced garlic and red pepper flakes. Cook until garlic is fragrant and softened, about 5 minutes.

Increase the heat to medium high then add in the wine and lemon juice. Use a spatula to scrape up any of the browned bits on the bottom. Continue to cook until the mixture is reduced by half, about 2 to 3 minutes.

Add the seared shrimp, cooked pasta and ½ cup reserved pasta water. Cook over high heat until everything is evenly combined and the sauce has thickened.  Add more pasta water as needed to achieve desired consistency.
Remove from heat and stir in the parsley and lemon zest. Serve immediately.
Enjoy!

name: 50-clove Garlic Stuffed Focaccia

ingredients.prep: plus 2 tablespoons olive oil, divided, plus more as needed

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C).

Roast the garlic: Using a sharp knife, slice the top ¼–½ inch off the tops of the garlic heads, exposing the individual cloves. Remove any loose, papery skins. Place the garlic cut-side up in the center of a large piece of foil.

Drizzle all the garlic heads with ¼ cup of olive oil and sprinkle with salt and pepper. Fold the foil around the garlic. Place in a small baking dish and roast in the oven for 40-60 minutes, or until the cloves are soft and creamy.

Meanwhile, combine the water, the remaining 2 tablespoons of olive oil, the honey, 2 teaspoons salt, the flour, and yeast in a large bowl. Mix well, then knead for 10-15 minutes, until the dough is elastic.
Transfer the dough into a well-oiled bowl. Cover with a towel or plastic wrap and let rise once for 1 hour in a warm place, or until the dough has doubled.
Reduce the oven temperature to 375˚F (190˚C).

Remove the dough from the bowl and transfer half to a 10-inch cast iron pan. Squeeze all the roasted garlic cloves onto the dough and spread in an even layer with an offset spatula. Top with the remaining dough. Cover with a towel or plastic wrap and let rest for 30 minutes.
Poke holes in the top of the dough with your fingertips. Drizzle with olive oil and add any other desired toppings.
Bake in the oven for 20-30 minutes.
Slice and serve.
Enjoy!

name: 50-clove Korean Garlic Butter Chicken Skewers
instructions: Make the marinated chicken: In a large bowl, whisk together the gochujang, soy sauce, canola oil, sesame oil, honey, rice vinegar, ginger, and garlic. Add the chicken, and toss to coat. Cover and marinate in the fridge for at least 2 hours or up to overnight.
Soak 8 wooden skewers in water for at least 30 minutes or up to 4 hours to prevent burning during cooking. (No need to soak if using metal skewers.)
Preheat the air fryer to 204°C (200°C). Thread the marinated chicken onto soaked wooden skewers, and lightly spray with cooking spray.
Arrange the skewers in the air-fryer basket. Cook for 10–12 minutes, until the internal temperature reaches 74°C (75°C) and the edges are slightly charred.

Meanwhile, make the Korean honey-garlic butter sauce: In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the garlic, and cook, stirring often, until softened and fragrant, 2–3 minutes. Remove from heat. Stir in the honey, gochugaru, and soy sauce. Whisk until evenly combined. Set aside until ready to serve.
Liberally brush the cooked skewers with the garlic butter. Garnish with cilantro and scallions. Serve immediately.
Enjoy!

name: 50-garlic Clove Beef Bulgogi Onigiri
instructions: Make the garlic rice: Place the room-temperature avocado oil and garlic in a nonstick skillet. Place the skillet over high heat, and cook, stirring constantly, until garlic turns amber color, 7–10 minutes.

Immediately pour the fried garlic mixture through a fine mesh strainer into a heatproof bowl; discard the oil. Transfer the fried garlic to a paper towel to absorb any excess oil. Stir about half of the crispy garlic into the hot cooked rice until evenly combined. Set aside the remaining crispy garlic.

Make the beef bulgogi: Place the pear, soy sauce, brown sugar, sesame oil, gochujang, garlic, ginger, and 2 tablespoons of the canola oil in a blender. Process on high speed for 2–3 minutes, until you achieve a smooth consistency.
Place the beef and marinade in a large bowl, and stir to coat the meat. Cover with plastic wrap, and let marinate at room temperature for 30 minutes or up to 2 hours in the fridge.

Heat the remaining 1 tablespoon canola oil in a large skillet over high heat until it shimmers. Add the marinated bulgogi to the skillet, and cook for about 4 minutes, or until browned. Flip and cook for 1–2 minutes, until browned on the other side and fully cooked through. Transfer the bulgogi to a plate, and let cool for about 5 minutes.

Wet your palms with water. Take a handful of the garlic rice, and make an indentation in the middle. Place a little bit of beef bulgogi in the indentation. Wrap the rice around the beef, and use your hands to form the rice into a triangle shape. (If using an onigiri mold, place the rice mixture in the mold, press lightly, and release for a perfect triangle.)

Place the reserved crispy garlic on a plate. Roll the outer edges of each rice triangle in the garlic. Wrap a strip of nori around the rice triangle. Repeat the process with the remaining ingredients.
Enjoy!

name: 7 Blw Cookie Recipes For Babies, Healthy And
original_name: 7 recetas de galletas BLW para bebés, saludables y fáciles

ingredients.item: 250 g de plátano, aproximadamente 2 plátanos medianos
½ cucharadita de esencia de vainilla

instructions: Esta receta es ideal para bebés, proporcionando fibra y energía de forma natural. Además, no contiene azúcares añadidos, ni huevos, lácteos, o frutos secos, lo que la hace perfecta para los bebés más pequeños que pueden tomarlas desde los 6 meses.

Coloca 1 cucharada de semillas de chía en un bol con las 3 cucharadas de agua y deja reposar durante 10-15 minutos (deberían comenzar a gelificar en este tiempo). Opcional: Para obtener galletas más suaves y tersas, tritura los copos de avena convirtiéndolos en harina de avena.

En un bol mediano, machaca el plátano. Incorpora las semillas de chía remojadas y ½ cucharadita de esencia de vainilla. Añade la avena y la harina, mezcla bien. Esto debería formar una masa de galletas con una textura bastante húmeda y pegajosa.

Usa una cucharada para tomar porciones de la mezcla y colócalas en una bandeja de horno forrada con papel de hornear. La mezcla será bastante pegajosa, por lo que darles forma perfecta será un poco complicado, lo mejor es humedecer las manos para dar forma a las galletas y evitar que se te peguen. Coloca las bolas en una bandeja de horno forrada.

Hornea a 180ºC (aproximadamente 360ºF) durante 25-30 minutos, deja enfriar. Las galletas deben tener una textura suave. Almacena en un recipiente hermético durante 2 días, o congela hasta 3 meses y descongela según sea necesario.

name: 1-hour Banana Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Whisk the softened butter and caster sugar together until light and fluffy
Add the egg and a tablespoon of the flour whisk till combined. Then, mash the banana.
Add the mashed banana and flour into the wet ingredients and fold them in.
Pour batter into loaf pan and bake for 45-50 mins.
Cool and serve.

name: 1-hour Noodles (zha Jiang Mian)

ingredients.prep: 8 teaspoons cornstarch mixed with 4 teaspoons water

instructions: In a medium pan, heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium heat. Add 1 tablespoon of minced garlic, the ginger, and shallot and sauté until lightly aromatic, 1-2 minutes. Add the ground pork to the pan and cook, undisturbed, until golden brown, 3-5 minutes.

Meanwhile, in a small pan, heat another tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium-low heat. Add the soy bean paste and sweet bean sauce and cook until caramelized, 1-2 minutes, being careful not to burn.

Add the caramelized bean paste mixture to the ground pork mixture and stir to combine. Add the soy sauce and cook for another 30 seconds to incorporate. Add the cornstarch slurry, reduce the heat to low, and simmer for about 15 minutes, adding a few tablespoons of water at a time as needed to keep the mixture at a simmer.

Meanwhile, heat a small pan over low heat. Add the remaining  teaspoon of vegetable oil, then pour in the egg and tilt the pan to spread in a thin layer. Cook until the top is just set, then remove the egg crepe from the pan. Let cool, then thinly slice.
Cook the noodles according to the package instructions, then drain.
Place the cooked noodles in a serving bowl and top with the ground pork mixture. Garnish with the egg crepe strips, cucumber, cilantro, and remaining teaspoon of minced garlic.
Enjoy!

name: 10 Minute Pastry Recipe With Cheese

ingredients.item: 100 gram beyaz peynir veya lor peyniri
1 yemek kaşığı süt veya ayrılmış yumurta sarısı

instructions: 1. Bir kaba un ve kabartma tozunu eleyin.
2.  Yoğurt, sıvı yağ, 1 yumurta ve tuzu ekleyin.
3.  Kulak memesi kıvamında yumuşak bir hamur yoğurun.
4. Beyaz peyniri çatalla ezin.
5.  İsteğe göre ince doğranmış maydanoz ekleyin.
6. Hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar koparın.
7.  Avuç içinde açıp içine peynirli harçtan koyun.
8.  Hamuru kapatıp yuvarlayın veya klasik poğaça şekli verin.
9. Poğaçaları yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine dizin.
10.  Üzerine süt veya yumurta sarısı sürün.
11.  Susam veya çörek otu serpin.
12. Önceden ısıtılmış 200°C fırında 15-20 dakika (mini poğaçalar için) veya üzeri altın rengi olana kadar pişirin ve servis edin.
13.  Afiyet olsun.

name: 10-minute Baked Potato
instructions: Carefully pierce potatoes with a fork.
Oil the potato well and sprinkle with salt.
Add 2 slices of bacon to the plate and heat in the microwave for 7-9 minutes.
Crush the bacon and save for later.
Once cooled, cut the potato vertically and scoop the inside slightly.
Add the cheese and microwave for another 30 seconds.
Add the sour cream to the potato.
Top with crushed bacon and chives and serve.
Enjoy!

name: 10-minute Broccoli In Garlic Sauce
instructions: Stir 1 Tbsp. chicken bouillon paste into ⅓ cup water in a small bowl until dissolved; set aside.

Heat 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large high-sided skillet over medium-high heat. Cook 6 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, stirring, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add 2 medium heads of broccoli (about 2 lb.), florets cut into bite-size pieces, and cook, tossing constantly, until starting to turn bright green, about 30 seconds. Pour in reserved bouillon mixture and cover pan immediately. Cook until broccoli is crisp-tender, about 3 minutes.

Stir 2 tsp. cornstarch and 2 Tbsp. water in a small bowl. Add to pan along with 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter and 2 tsp. toasted sesame oil; toss to combine. Cook, uncovered, stirring often, until sauce is thickened and coats broccoli, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a large bowl.

name: 10-minute Chana Masala

ingredients.prep: only if canned chickpeas ingredients include a firming agent like calcium chloride
or ginger paste from 1 frozen ginger cube; see notes
or garlic paste from 1 frozen garlic cube; see notes

ingredients.item: Cayenne pepper or red chile flakes

instructions: In a small saucepan, cover chickpeas with water, add the baking soda, bring to a boil, then cook until very tender, about 6 minutes. Drain and proceed with the recipe.
In a small skillet, melt butter over medium heat; as butter is melting, add ginger and garlic. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook, stirring frequently, until fragrant but not browned, about 1 minute.
Stir in turmeric, cayenne or chile flakes, and ground coriander and cook, stirring constantly, until lightly toasted and fragrant, about 30 seconds; do not allow spices to scorch.
Stir in drained chickpeas and tomato paste and cook until warmed through. Meanwhile, measure 1/2 cup of reserved chickpea liquid (if necessary, add water to total 1/2 cup).

Add the 1/2 cup chickpea liquid, diced tomatoes, sugar, heavy cream, and garam masala, then season with salt. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, then reduce heat to a simmer and cook, stirring often, until tomatoes break down and liquid thickens to a spoon-coating consistency, 3 to 5 minutes; reduce heat, if necessary, to prevent scorching. Remove from heat, season with more salt, if needed, then serve.

name: 10-minute Healthy Donabe Stew

ingredients.prep: and seafood (shrimp, mussels, clams), meatballs, fish cakes - seared as desired
(shitake, shimeji, enoki, oyster), bok choy, cabbage, turnips, carrots
jalapeńo or serrano peppers, bean sprouts, scallions, cilantro, seaweed
(a Japanese pot great for one-serving meals) or a generic pot

instructions: In a donabe or small pot, bring chicken broth, water, and white miso to a boil at high heat.
Reduce to medium/low heat and add your proteins. Simmer for 3 minutes or more, depending on how long your protein takes to cook.
Add the vegetables and egg (optional) and simmer for 3-4 minutes.
Turn the heat off, and add salt or soy sauce to your taste.
Sprinkle with toppings and you're done!
Enjoy!

name: 10-minute Lamb And Asparagus Stir-fry

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: woody ends trimmed, sliced on a diagonal  0.5" thick

ingredients.item: Finely chopped dill fronds and tender stems‚ plus more chopped fronds for serving

instructions: Heat a dry large cast-iron skillet over medium-high until beginning to smoke. Pour in 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil, then add 1 lb. ground lamb and use a wooden spoon or heatproof spatula to press meat into a thin layer. Sprinkle with 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, season with freshly ground black pepper, and scatter one 2" piece ginger, peeled, finely chopped, over. Cook, undisturbed, until lamb is deeply browned underneath, about 5 minutes.

Break up meat into bite-size pieces, then add 6 scallions, thinly sliced, 1 lb. asparagus, woody ends trimmed, sliced on a diagonal ½" thick, and ½ cup finely chopped dill fronds and tender stems. Season with salt and pepper. Cook, tossing often, until lamb is cooked through and asparagus is bright green and just crisp-tender, about 2 minutes (it’s okay if asparagus is still a little crunchy—it will continue to soften off the heat). Taste and add more salt and pepper if needed. Scatter finely grated zest of ½ lemon over.
Divide stir-fry among bowls or plates and top with more dill. Serve with lemon wedges for squeezing over.

name: 10-minute Microwave Apple Crisp For One

ingredients.prep: peeled, cored, and cut into 3/4-inch pieces

ingredients.item: Ground cinnamon or apple pie spice blend

instructions: For the topping: In a microwave-safe bowl, mix flour, sugar, oats, and salt together. Using fingers, rub butter into the flour mixture until the mixture has the texture of coarse breadcrumbs. Microwave on high power, stirring every 30 seconds, until golden and fragrant, 2 to 3 minutes. Transfer to a plate and let cool slightly while preparing the filling.

For the apple filling: In the now-empty microwave-safe bowl, combine apple, sugar, flour, lemon juice, and cinnamon and microwave until apple is softened and juices have thickened slightly, 3 to 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Sprinkle topping over the warm filling and serve.

name: 10-minute Tomato Basil Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine tomato, basil, olive oil, red wine vinegar, salt, and black pepper in a large bowl; toss until evenly coated.

name: 11 Herbs And Spices Fried Chicken
instructions: Beat the eggs into the buttermilk.
Add the chicken pieces to the buttermilk mixture and chill for an hour.
In a large mixing bowl, mix the flour with all the herbs and spices.
Coat the soaked chicken pieces in the herbed flour mixture, shaking off any excess.
Heat oil in a large sauce pan to 325˚F (170°C), then turn to low heat.
Fry the chicken in batches for 15 minutes until the chicken is cooked and the skins turn golden brown.
Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate.
Enjoy!

name: 12 Layer Turkey Pesto Panini Bread Bowl
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C).
Make the pesto: In a food processor, combine the basil, garlic, pine nuts, and olive oil. Blend for 30 seconds, or until thick and saucy.
Add the Parmesan and salt and blend for another 30 seconds, or until thoroughly combined.
Cut the top off the loaf of bread. Use a serrated knife to cut a circle in the center of the bread, then use a large spoon to scoop out the inside. Try to keep bread in one piece.
Use a rolling pin to roll the excess bread into one flat piece of bread. Spread melted butter on both side of the rolled out bread and bake for 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove the toasted bread from the oven.

Assemble the sandwich:  Place bread bowl in an oven-safe pan. Spread pesto on the bottom of the inside of the bread bowl, then layer in half of the mozzarella slices, 4 slices of tomatoes, 5 slices of turkey, and 4 chopped slices of bacon.

Top with the toasted bread and brush with pesto. Add the remaining bacon, turkey, tomato, and cheese. Finally, spread pesto on the bottom lid of the bread and over the cheese. Place the lid of bread on top of it and then press down with a heavy oven-safe pan.
Bake for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Enjoy!

name: 12 Spoon Cake
instructions: Bata os ovos com o açúcar, até obter uma consistência fofa e esbranquiçada. Adicione a raspa e o sumo de limão, uma pitada de sal e o óleo, batendo sempre.
Junte a água, a farinha e o fermento aos poucos e bata até obter uma massa homogénea.

Deite o preparado numa forma, tipo bolo inglês, previamente untada com manteiga e polvilhada com farinha. Leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180º c, durante cerca 40 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer e sirva polvilhado com açúcar em pó.

name: 12-minute Saucy Chicken Breasts
instructions: Place a 10" cast-iron skillet in oven; preheat oven to 475°. Lay your hands on another heavy skillet or saucepan the same diameter or smaller and tear off an 8" piece of foil; set aside near stove.

Mix cumin, turmeric, paprika, and 1 tsp. salt in a small bowl. Brace yourself: This next step requires some light butchery, but it’s easy. Place chicken skin side down on a cutting board and find the short row of small rib bones near the outer edge of the breast. Grip them with your fingers and pull them off (or use a paring knife or shears). Next: along the center line where the breast was cut in half, there’s a dark, vaguely rectangular bone—it almost looks like an anvil. Sometimes it’s in one piece, or both sides will have a half of it. It doesn’t matter: Grip the bone with your fingers and pull it out, then tease out the strip of flexible cartilage just below it. All done! Now the chicken will lay flat in the pan, which is why it cooks so quickly.

Season both sides of chicken with salt, then with all of the spice rub. Remove hot skillet from oven and set over medium-high heat. Add oil, then lay chicken into pan, skin side down. Use a spatula to firmly press chicken against surface, then add 1 lime to pan, placing sides down. Cook until skin is starting to brown, about 2 minutes. Transfer skillet to oven, lay reserved foil over chicken, then weight with second pan. Cook 10 minutes.

Remove pan from oven and turn chicken over; cook second side in residual heat 1 minute. Squeeze juice from cooked limes into pan; transfer chicken and pan juices to a plate and serve with remaining lime halves.


Editor's note: Head this way for more of our best chicken breast recipes →

name: 15-minute Chicken Paillards
instructions: Pound chicken between 2 sheets of plastic wrap to ¼" thick; season with salt and pepper. Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in large skillet over high. Carefully place 1 chicken breast in skillet (laying it away from you) and cook until golden brown and nearly cooked through, about 3 minutes. Turn and cook until cooked through, about 1 minute (second side will not brown). Transfer to a large plate. Repeat with 1 Tbsp. oil and remaining cutlet. Let the cutlets rest while you make the slaw.
Toss cabbage, onion, and red pepper flakes in a medium bowl; season with salt. Drizzle in vinegar and remaining 3 Tbsp. oil and toss again.
Top cutlets with slaw.

name: 15-minute Chicken Paillards With Red Cabbage And Onion Slaw
instructions: Pound chicken between 2 sheets of plastic wrap to 1/4" thick; season with salt and pepper. Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in large skillet over high. Carefully place 1 chicken breast in skillet (laying it away from you) and cook until golden brown and nearly cooked through, about 3 minutes. Turn and cook until cooked through, about 1 minute (second side will not brown). Transfer to a large plate. Repeat with 1 Tbsp. oil and remaining cutlet. Let the cutlets rest while you make the slaw.
Toss cabbage, onion, and red pepper flakes in a medium bowl; season with salt. Drizzle in vinegar and remaining 3 Tbsp. oil and toss again.
Top cutlets with slaw.

name: 15-minute Garlic Bread Pizza
instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230°C).
Arrange the frozen garlic toast on a baking sheet.
Make the pepperoni garlic bread pizza: Top 2 slices of garlic toast with the pizza sauce, mozzarella, and pepperoni.
Make the veggie lovers garlic bread pizza: Top 2 slices of garlic toast with the pizza sauce, mozzarella, bell pepper, zucchini, mushrooms, and olives.
Make the bacon jalapeño garlic bread pizza: Top 2 slices of garlic toast with the ranch, mozzarella, crumbled bacon, and pickled jalapeño slices.
Make the margherita garlic bread pizza: Top 2 slices of garlic toast with the tomato slices and mozzarella.
Bake for 8–12 minutes, until the bread is crispy and warmed through and the cheese is melted. Garnish the margherita garlic bread pizzas with the basil.
Enjoy!

name: 15-minute Teriyaki Chicken

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken thighs or breasts, thinly sliced against the grain into bite-size strips

ingredients.item: Toasted sesame seeds and steamed white rice

instructions: Whisk 1 Tbsp. cornstarch and ⅓ cup water in a small bowl until cornstarch is dissolved. Set cornstarch slurry aside.

Thinly slice dark green parts of 2 scallions on a diagonal and set aside for serving. Continue slicing pale green parts of scallions and transfer to a medium bowl. Add one 1" piece ginger, peeled, finely grated, 5 garlic cloves, finely grated, ½ cup low-sodium soy sauce, ¼ cup (packed) dark brown sugar, and 1 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar and whisk to combine; set aside.

Warm 3 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add 1½ lb. skinless, boneless chicken thighs or breasts, thinly sliced against the grain into bite-size strips, in an even layer, and season with kosher salt and freshly ground pepper. Cook chicken, undisturbed, until mostly cooked through and golden underneath, about 3 minutes. Toss and continue to cook until completely cooked through, about 1 minute more. Transfer to a plate.

Pour reserved teriyaki sauce into skillet and reduce heat to medium. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly and scraping up browned bits. Rewhisk cornstarch slurry if it has separated, then add to skillet. Cook, stirring often, until sauce thickens and turns glossy, about 3 minutes. Return chicken pieces to pan and toss to coat. Remove pan from heat. Garnish chicken teriyaki with toasted sesame seeds and reserved scallion greens. Serve with steamed white rice.
Editor’s note: This easy teriyaki chicken recipe was first printed online in December 2022. Head this way for more of our favorite stir-fry recipes →

name: 2 Ingredient Mini Pancakes
instructions: 1. Yumurtayla muzu iyice çırpın.
2.  Kabarınca pankek tavasında orta ateşte iki tarafını pişirin.
3.  Afiyet olsun.

name: 2 Recipes For 100% Natural And Ice Cream
original_name: 2 recetas fáciles de helados 100% naturales y rápidos

ingredients.item: 3  bananos cortados en trozos y congelados
2 cda de la leche de tu elección
3  bananos cortados en trozos y congelados
2 cda de la leche de tu elección

instructions: Inicia tu receta de helados, colocando las fresas cortadas y los bananos cortados en una licuadora o mixer.
Luego, incorpora la leche y el azúcar o edulcorante.
Ahora, procesa hasta que se integren y obtengas una textura cremosa.
¡Sirve y disfruta!

name: 2-hour Strawberry Cheesecake
instructions: Make the crust: Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C).
Add the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted butter to a medium bowl and mix well.
Transfer the crumbs to a 9-inch pie dish and press evenly against the bottom and up the sides.
Bake the crust for 5–10 minutes, until firm.
Remove the crust from the oven and let cool. Reduce the oven temperature to 149°C (150°C).

Make the filling: In the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment, combine the cream cheese and beat until smooth. Add the sour cream and beat on medium speed until well incorporated, scraping down the sides of the bowl as neede. Add the sugar and beat to combine. Add the eggs, 1 at a time, beating until well combined before adding the next addition. Add the vanilla and beat to incorporate.
Pour the cream cheese filling into the prepared crust.
Bake for 45–60 minutes, until mostly set but still slightly jiggly at the center. The cheesecake will continue to set as it cools.
Remove the cheesecake from the oven and chill in the refrigerator for 1 hour, or until set.
Make the strawberry topping: Add the strawberries, sugar, and corn syrup to a medium skillet over medium-high heat. Cook until syrupy, but the strawberry halves are mostly intact, about 5 minutes.

In a small bowl, whisk together the water and cornstarch. Add to the strawberry mixture and cook until thick and glossy, 2–3 minutes.  Transfer the topping to a heatproof bowl and refrigerate until cool.
When ready to serve, pour the topping over the cheesecake and spread evenly. Slice and serve.
Enjoy!

name: 2-ingredient Candied Jalapeños
instructions: Drain off enough of juice in jalapeño jar so that adding the sugar won't cause a spill. Pour the 5-pound bag of sugar into the jar and seal tightly. Let jar sit for at least one week to mix flavors; flip the jar daily to blend.

name: 2-ingredient Dog Treats
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper.

Mix flour and baby food by hand in a medium bowl to form a stiff dough. Place dough onto a clean, lightly floured work surface. Dust a rolling pin with flour and roll the dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch. Cut into desired shapes and place onto the prepared baking sheets, leaving 1/2 inch between cookies.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes. Turn oven off and leave cookies inside for 30 minutes. Remove and transfer to wire racks to cool.

name: 2-ingredient Dough Air Fryer Blueberry Bagels
instructions: Place blueberries in a small bowl, and pour boiling water over them. Let sit for 5 minutes, and drain
Add flour, yogurt, and blueberries to a large stand mixer bowl. Using the dough hook, mix at low speed for about 3 minutes. If you're using a KitchenAid mixer, use speed 3. Dough will be crumbly.

Transfer the dough to a lightly floured surface. Divide the dough into 4 equal balls, pressing, stretching, and rolling into ropes that are about 8 inches long, 3/4-inch thick. Connect the ends pinching into a bagel shape with hole in the middle.

Preheat an air fryer to 138°C (137 degrees C) for about 3 minutes. Combine the egg and water, and brush on each bagel, then sprinkle with cinnamon sugar. Line the air fryer basket with a parchment liner or lightly spray with cooking spray.

Place the bagels in the basket not touching, and cook until golden brown, 15 to 16 minutes. Don't crowd the basket, and cook in two batches if necessary. Your time may vary depending on the size and brand of your air fryer.
Remove the bagels to a rack, and cool for about 10 minutes before slicing.

name: 2-ingredient Fruit Dip
instructions: Using an electric mixer, beat cream cheese until smooth.
Add marshmallow creme and blend until smooth.

name: 2-ingredient Peanut Butter Fudge
instructions: Line an 8x8-inch baking dish with plastic wrap long enough to overhang the dish by several inches on each side.

Place almond bark in a large glass microwave-safe bowl. Microwave on low power until melted, smooth, and creamy, about 5 minutes, stirring every 30 to 60 seconds. Stir in peanut butter until fudge is thoroughly combined. Spread into the prepared baking dish.
Refrigerate until set, 1 to 2 hours. Lift fudge out of the pan using the overhanging plastic wrap as handles; slice into 48 squares with a pizza cutter.

name: 2-ingredient Pineapple Whip
instructions: Combine frozen pineapple and sparkling water in a blender; blend until icy and frothy, 1 to 2 minutes.

name: 2-ingredient Pumpkin Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C). Grease a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan with nonstick spray.
In a medium bowl, mix together the spice cake mix and pumpkin purée until smooth.
Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan and smooth the top. Bake for 55-60 minutes, until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Let cool completely.
If desired, frost and garnish with your toppings of choice.
Enjoy!

name: 2-ingredient Rotel Bean Dip

ingredients.item: Diced tomatoes with lime juice and cilantro

instructions: Drain Rotel, and reserve liquid.
Combine tomatoes and black beans in a blender; blend until smooth.
Add reserved liquid, a little at a time; blend until dip reaches desired consistency.

name: 2-ingredient Strawberry Sorbet
instructions: Combine strawberries and condensed milk in a high-powered blender (such as Vitamix); blend, stopping occasionally to scrape down sides of the blender with a spatula, until completely smooth.
Transfer to a freezer-safe container; freeze for 2 hours.

name: 20-minute Basil, Chicken ' Tomato Rice

ingredients.item: Uncle ben's® flavor infusions chicken & herb rice

instructions: Heat olive oil in large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chicken strips and cook until they are just done (4 to 6 minutes).
Add onion, red pepper slices, and fresh garlic.
Continue cooking, stirring occasionally, until vegetables barely tender (4 to 5 minutes).
Add water, tomatoes, and rice.
Cover pan and continue cooking until mixture just comes to a boil.
Reduce heat to medium low and continue cooking until rice is tender or liquid is absorbed (about 10 minutes).
Remove cover; stir in basil leaves and Parmesan cheese. Refrigerate leftovers.

name: 20-minute Crispy Pork Dumplings
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine the cabbage, ground pork, ginger, scallions, low-sodium soy sauce, dark soy sauce, sesame oil, Shaoxing wine, cornstarch, egg, and salt. Mix well to combine.
Lightly dust a baking sheet with flour.

Scoop 1 heaping tablespoon of filling onto the center of a dumpling wrapper. Dip your finger in water and brush over the edges of the wrapper, then fold the wrapper over the filling to meet in the center. Fold the outside edges inward and pleat to seal. Place on the floured baking sheet and repeat with the remaining filling and wrappers.

Heat the vegetable oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add half of the dumplings to the pan and cook until the bottoms are brown, about 5 minutes. Add 3 tablespoons of water to the pan. Cover and steam for about 5 minutes, or until the water has evaporated. Remove the dumplings from the pan and repeat with the remaining dumplings.
Meanwhile, make the dipping sauce: In a small bowl, stir together the chile oil, low-sodium soy sauce, black vinegar, sesame oil, brown sugar, and ginger.
Transfer the dumplings to a serving plate, flipping some bottom-side up. Garnish with scallions and sesame seeds. Serve immediately with the dipping sauce alongside.
Enjoy!

name: 20-minute Lemon Cheesecake
instructions: Bring a medium pot filled with a couple inches of water to a simmer. Set a heatproof bowl on top, making sure the bottom is not touching the water. Add the cream cheese and sugar to the bowl and stir to incorporate, then let melt.
Meanwhile, add the water and gelatin to a small bowl and let bloom until the water is absorbed, 2–3 minutes.
Once the cream cheese softens and turns off white in color, add the lemon juice, vanilla, and lemon zest. Whisk to incorporate and remove any lumps.
Add the bloomed gelatin to the cream cheese mixture and whisk until fully melted and incorporated.
Remove the bowl from the double boiler and freeze for 5–10 minutes, until cooled.
Remove the cream cheese mixture from the freezer and gradually fold in the whipped topping until well incorporated.
Scoop the filling into the mini graham cracker crusts. Freeze for 15 minutes, or until completely set.
Garnish with lemon wedges and mint, then serve.
Enjoy!

name: 20-minute Shrimp Fajitas Sheet Pan Dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C). Spray a rimmed baking sheet with cooking spray.

Combine shrimp, bell peppers, red onion, olive oil, chili powder, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, onion powder, cumin, and paprika in a large bowl; toss to combine. Spread mixture on the prepared pan evenly.
Cook in the preheated oven until shrimp are bright pink and firm, about 8 minutes. Turn on the oven's broiler and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Squeeze lime juice over mixture.
Build fajitas on tortillas with avocado slices and cilantro.

name: 25-minute Mussels In White Wine
instructions: To clean mussels, scrub them with a stiff brush under cold running water to remove any grit. Discard any mussels with cracked or broken shells, or that do not close.
In a large lidded pot over medium-high heat, stir butter until melted. Add the onion and cook, stirring frequently, until it has softened and started to brown, 6-8 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 30 seconds, stirring constantly.
Add the red pepper flakes and season with salt. Stir to combine.
Add the mussels and stir until completely coated. Add the white wine and stir.
Put the lid on the pot and cook until the mussels have opened, 3-5 minutes. Discard any shells that don’t open after 5 minutes.
Add the parsley and stir. Serve with bread.
Enjoy!

name: 25-minute Scalloped Potatoes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C.
Mix together all the ingredients and place in an oven-safe baking or casserole dish.
Bake for 25 minutes then remove from oven.
Sprinkle the potatoes with cheddar cheese and place back in the oven for five minutes, until melted.
Serve and enjoy!

name: 2½ Hour Tomato Sauce
instructions: In a pot over medium heat, add the olive oil and garlic. Cook for about 2 minutes or until fragrant, but not browned.
Add the tomatoes with their juice, and crush with the back of a spoon.
Add the onion and salt, and stir occasionally. Bring to a boil, then reduce to a simmer for an hour.
Discard the garlic and onion, then puree to the desired consistency with a food mill or immersion blender.
Transfer the sauce back to a pot and add the bay leaf, dried oregano, and dried basil. Bring to a simmer for about 90 minutes or until the desired thickness.
Discard the bay leaf, add the fresh basil and, to taste, salt, pepper, and sugar.
Enjoy!

name: 3 Ingredient Brownie Recipe

ingredients.item: 3 tepeleme yemek kaşığı kahvaltılık kakaolu fındık kreması
1 yemek kaşığı çekilmiş fındık (isterseniz antep fıstığı da kullanabilirsiniz)

instructions: 1. İlk olarak yumurtaları derin bir karıştırma kabına kırın ve köpüklenene kadar çırpın.
2.  Ardından kakaolu fındık kremasını ekleyip karışım tamamen bütünleşene kadar çırpmaya devam edin.
3. Unu yavaş yavaş ilave ederek pürüzsüz, akışkan ama yoğun bir kıvam elde edene kadar karıştırın.
4.  Hazırladığınız brownie harcını mini muffin kalıplarına, kalıpların yaklaşık ¾’ünü dolduracak şekilde paylaştırın.
5. Üzerlerine dilediğiniz kadar çekilmiş fındık ya da Antep fıstığı serpin.
6.  Önceden ısıtılmış 190°C fırında 6–7 dakika pişirin.
7.  Fırından çıktıktan sonra ılımasını bekleyip kalıptan çıkararak servis edin.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

name: 3 Ingredient Cheese And Salty Cookies Recipe

ingredients.item: Süzme peynir yerine lor peyniri veya ezilmiş beyaz peynir kullanılabilir. daha yoğun bir tat için kaşar peyniri de tercih edilebilir.
Mısır unu yerine aynı miktarda tam buğday unu veya normal un kullanılabilir. bu durumda kurabiyenin dokusu biraz daha farklı olabilir.
çörek otu yerine susam, haşhaş veya ayçekirdeği içi kullanılabilir.
Kurabiyelere farklı bir aroma katmak için hamura ince kıyılmış dereotu veya maydanoz eklenebilir.
Daha yoğun bir peynir tadı için hamura birkaç yemek kaşığı rendelenmiş kaşar peyniri ilave edilebilir.
Hafif baharatlı bir lezzet elde etmek için karışıma bir tutam karabiber veya kırmızı pul biber eklenebilir.

instructions: 1. Derin bir karıştırma kabına süzme peyniri alın.
2.  Üzerine mısır unu ve çörek otunu ekleyin.
3. Tüm malzemeleri elinizle yoğurarak yumuşak ve toparlanan bir hamur elde edin.
4. Hazırladığınız hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar koparıp avuç içinde yuvarlayın.
5. Şekil verdiğiniz hamurları yağlı kâğıt serilmiş fırın tepsisine aralıklı olarak yerleştirin.
6. Önceden 180 °C’ye ısıtılmış fırında yaklaşık 15–20 dakika, üzerleri hafif kızarana kadar pişirin.
7. Fırından çıkan kurabiyeleri birkaç dakika dinlendirdikten sonra servis edebilirsiniz.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

name: 3 Ingredient Cheesecake
instructions: 1. Yumurtaların sarılarını ve beyazlarını dikkatlice ayırın.
2.  Beyazlarını cam bir kapta buzdolabına alın, soğuk kalmaları köpürmeleri için önemli.
3. Beyaz çikolatayı benmari usulü veya mikrodalgada düşük ısıda eritin.
4.  Hafif ılındığında krem peyniri ekleyin ve pürüzsüz bir kıvam alana kadar karıştırın.
5. Karışıma yumurta sarılarını ekleyin ve iyice yedirin.
6. Soğuk yumurta beyazlarını mikserle sert köpük hâline gelene dek çırpın (kar gibi olmalı).
7.  Sonra bu köpüğü peynirli karışıma üç aşamada, spatula ile alttan üste katlayarak yedirin.
8.  Hacmini söndürmemeye dikkat edin.
9. 15–18 cm çapında kelepçeli bir kalıbın içini yağlayın, tabanına yağlı kâğıt serin.
10.  Karışımı kalıba dökün.
11.  Kalıbı bir fırın tepsisine yerleştirin ve bu tepsiye 1 parmak kadar sıcak su ekleyin (benmari yöntemi).
12. Önceden ısıtılmış 160 derece fırında 15 dakika pişirin.
13.  Sonra sıcaklığı 140 derece’ye düşürüp 20–25 dakika daha pişirin.
14.  Fırını kapatın, kapağı aralık bırakıp içinde 15 dakika bekletin.
15. Oda sıcaklığına gelen keki buzdolabında en az 3 saat (ideali 1 gece) dinlendirin.
16.  İsteğe bağlı olarak üzerine pudra şekeri serpebilir ya da meyveyle süsleyebilirsiniz.
17.  Afiyet olsun.

name: 3 Ingredient Cocostar Recipe

ingredients.item: Süt yerine krema kullanarak daha yoğun ve yumuşak bir iç doku elde edebilirsiniz.
Pudra şekeri yerine bal veya pekmez kullanarak daha doğal bir tat yakalayabilirsiniz.
çikolata olarak bitter, sütlü veya beyaz çikolata tercih edebilirsiniz.
Daha sağlıklı bir alternatif için şekersiz çikolata kullanabilirsiniz.
Hindistancevizine biraz süt tozu ekleyerek daha kremamsı bir kıvam elde edebilirsiniz.
İçine ince kıyılmış badem veya fındık ekleyerek farklı bir doku kazandırabilirsiniz.
üzerine çikolata yerine kakao serpiştirerek daha hafif bir versiyon hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Vegan yapmak isterseniz süt yerine bitkisel süt kullanabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Hindistancevizi ve pudra şekerini bir kaba alın.
2.  Üzerine krema (ya da süt) ve vanilini ekleyip yoğurun.
3.  Ele yapışmayan, şekil verilebilir bir kıvam elde edin.
4. Karışımdan parçalar koparıp baton veya oval şekil verin.
5.  Hazırladığınız parçaları yağlı kağıt serili tepsiye dizin ve yaklaşık 20–30 dakika buzdolabında dinlendirin.
6. Çikolatayı benmari usulü eritin ve içine sıvı yağı ekleyip karıştırın.
7. Soğuyan hindistancevizli parçaları erimiş çikolataya batırın ve tekrar yağlı kağıt üzerine alın.
8. Çikolata tamamen donana kadar buzdolabında bekletin ve servis edin.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

name: 3 Ingredient Fit Cookie Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 yemek kaşığı damla çikolata veya kuru üzüm (isteğe bağlı)
Kuru üzüm, yaban mersini, hurma parçaları veya doğranmış kuru kayısı kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha yoğun tat için bitter çikolata parçaları ekleyin.

instructions: 1. Olgun muzları bir çatal yardımıyla püre haline getirin.
2. Yulaf ezmesini ve damla çikolata veya kuru üzümü ekleyip karıştırın.
3.  Karışımın kıvamı çok cıvıksa biraz daha yulaf ekleyebilirsiniz.
4. Karışımdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar alın, elinizle yuvarlayın veya bastırarak yassı kurabiye şekli verin.
5. Önceden ısıtılmış 180°C fırında yaklaşık 15 dakika, kenarları hafif kızarana kadar pişirin.
6. Kurabiyeleri fırından çıkarıp oda sıcaklığında birkaç dakika dinlendirin ve servis edin.
7.  Afiyet olsun.

name: 3 Ingredient Oven Custard Recipe
instructions: 1. Orta boy bir tencereye süt, toz şeker ve unu alın.
2. Tel çırpıcıyla sürekli karıştırarak topaklanmadan, orta ateşte koyulaşana kadar pişirin.
3. Muhallebi kaynamaya başladığında ocaktan alın ve 1-2 dakika karıştırarak ilk sıcaklığını atmasını bekleyin.
4. Hazırladığınız muhallebiyi ısıya dayanıklı fırın kaplarına paylaştırın.
5. Kapları derin bir tepsiye yerleştirin ve tepsinin yarısına gelecek kadar sıcak su ekleyin (benmari yöntemi).
6. Önceden ısıtılmış 200°C fırında, üzerleri hafif kahverengi bir tabaka oluşturana kadar, yaklaşık 15–20 dakika pişirin.
7. Oda sıcaklığına geldikten sonra buzdolabında en az 2 saat dinlendirin.
8. Soğuyunca fırın muhallebileriniz servise hazır.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

name: 3 Milk Cake Or Tres Leches
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 9x13-inch baking pan.

Beat egg whites in a large glass, metal, or ceramic bowl with an electric mixer until fluffy; gradually beat in sugar until soft peaks form. Gradually beat in flour, then beat in milk, egg yolks, melted butter, 4 teaspoons vanilla extract, and baking powder, thoroughly beating in each ingredient before adding the next. Pour batter into the prepared baking pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until browned and crusty on top, no more than 30 minutes. Cool cake in the pan for 10 minutes; gently remove from the pan to finish cooling.

Whisk sweetened condensed milk, evaporated milk, and half-and-half together in a bowl; pour half into a pan deeper and longer than cake. Lay cooled cake in milk mixture; score deep lines in cake top using a fork. Pour remaining milk mixture over cake, allowing mixture to soak in.

Beat cream cheese and remaining 1 teaspoon vanilla extract in a bowl with an electric mixer until soft and fluffy; gradually beat in heavy cream until frosting is thick and spreadable. Spread over cake.

name: 3 Milk Tapioca Recipe

ingredients.item: 1, 1/2 tazas de leche completa o regular

instructions: En un bol, incorpora la tapioca y dos tazas de agua. Deja remojar por unos 20 minutos.
Pasado ese tiempo, escurre muy bien el agua de la tapioca y reserva.
En una olla, vierte las otras tres tazas de agua y la tapioca. Cocina por unos 40 minutos a fuego medio hasta que vaya soltando el almidón.
Cuando pasen esos 40 minutos, vierte la leche completa, la leche condensada y la leche evaporada. Mezcla muy bien.
Incorpora la esencia de vainilla, mezcla y termina de cocinar por unos 15 minutos.
Luego, apaga y deja reposar un poco.
Sirve con canela en polvo y cerezas en almíbar. ¡Disfruta!

name: 3 Spoon Soup Recipe
instructions: 1. Pirinç, bulgur ve yeşil mercimeği yıkayıp süzün.
2. Bir tencereye 2 su bardağı kaynar suyu alın, içine tuzu ve yıkadığınız malzemeleri ekleyin.
3. Orta ateşte, malzemeler iyice yumuşayana kadar pişirin.
4.  Ara ara karıştırın ve gerekirse biraz sıcak su ekleyin.
5. Yoğurdu bir kaseye alın, üzerine yumurta ve unu ekleyip iyice çırpın.
6. Limon suyunu da ekleyerek homojen bir karışım elde edin.
7. Çorbanın suyundan birkaç kaşık alıp terbiyeye ekleyin ve hızlıca karıştırarak ılıştırın.
8. Ilınan terbiyeyi yavaş yavaş çorbaya ekleyin ve çorbayı karıştırarak kısık ateşte birkaç dakika kaynatın.
9. Soğanı ince ince doğrayın.
10. Küçük bir tavada zeytinyağını ısıtın, soğanları ekleyip pembeleşene kadar kavurun.
11. Pul biber ve naneyi ekleyip kısa bir süre karıştırdıktan sonra ocaktan alın.
12. Çorbayı kaselere alın.
13. Üzerine hazırladığınız sosu gezdirin.
14. Sıcak olarak servis edin.

name: 3-hour Pizza
instructions: In the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the dough hook, combine the flour, sugar, salt, and instant yeast. Start mixing on low speed. Stream in the olive oil and water and mix for 2 minutes, until the flour is incorporated.
Increase the mixer speed to medium, and mix for 6–8 minutes more, until the dough is smooth and elastic.
Lightly grease a large bowl with olive oil. Transfer the dough to the bowl, cover with a kitchen towel, and let rest for 1½ hours.

Turn the risen dough onto a clean surface and shape into a ball, pulling the edges round and tight across the surface of the dough ball. Return to the bowl, cover, and let rest for another 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 218°C (220°C).

Turn out the dough onto a lightly oiled surface. Divide the dough into 2 equal portions. Liberally grease a baking sheet with olive oil. Place a portion of dough on the pan and stretch to fit the baking sheet. Repeat with the remaining portion of dough, or reserve for a later use.
Top the dough with the crushed tomatoes and mozzarella.
Bake the pizza for 15–20 minutes, until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Top the pizza with flaky salt and basil. Use scissors to cut the pizza, then serve.
Enjoy!

name: 3-ingredient Buttermilk Biscuits
instructions: Position rack in middle of oven; preheat to 260°C. Grease a rimmed baking sheet with nonstick vegetable oil spray or butter.
Place 2 cups flour in a large bowl. Cut in shortening with a pastry cutter or 2 butter knives until pea-sized lumps form. Stir in buttermilk until a shaggy dough forms.

On a lightly floured work surface, turn out dough and gently knead 2–3 times until dough just comes together, being careful to not overwork. Roll out dough to a 1/2" thickness; cut with a 2" biscuit cutter or small glass that has been dipped in flour.
Transfer biscuits to prepared baking sheet and bake until golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack and let cool.

name: 3-ingredient Caramel-pear Galette

ingredients.item: Sheet prepared boxed pie crust (not in a tin)

ingredients.prep: preferably Anjou or Bartlett (about 1 1/2 pounds), thinly sliced crosswise, seeds cut out with a small round cutter or paring knife

instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C. Unroll pie crust onto a piece of parchment, then roll out to a 13"-diameter circle. Transfer dough on parchment to a rimmed baking sheet.

Toss pears, salt, and 1/2 cup caramel sauce in a medium bowl until pears are coated. Arrange pears over crust, leaving a 1 1/2" border, piling them up as you go. Pour any caramel sauce left in bowl over pears.

Fold crust up and over edges, overlapping as needed. Bake galette until crust is golden brown and filling is bubbling, 55–60 minutes. Whisk remaining 1 Tbsp. caramel and 1 Tbsp. hot water in a small bowl and brush over pears with a pastry brush. Let cool at least 15 minutes before cutting.

name: 3-ingredient Chili Tater Tot Cups

ingredients.prep: chopped scallions, pickled jalapeños, and hot sauce

instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220°C). Lightly grease a 12-cup muffin tin with cooking spray. Place 5 frozen tater tots in each muffin cup. Bake for about 10 minutes, or until softened.

Remove from the oven. Using the bottom of a small glass or measuring cup, press the tots in each muffin cup into a cup shape. Return to the oven, and bake for about 10 minutes, or until golden and crispy.
Remove from the oven, and spoon the chili evenly into the muffin cups. Top evenly with the cheese. Return to the oven, and bake for about 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven, and let cool slightly, about 3 minutes.Top with desired garnishes, and serve.
Enjoy!

name: 3-ingredient Chili-glazed Salmon
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200˚C).
In a bowl, mix together the salmon, chili sauce, and the scallions.
Place the fillets on a baking tray lined with parchment paper. Spoon any leftover sauce on top of the salmon.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, until the salmon is cooked but still tender.
Enjoy!

name: 3-ingredient Coconut Fudge Pops
instructions: Blend coconut milk, condensed milk, cocoa powder, and salt in a blender until smooth. Pour into ice-pop molds, leaving a little space at the top of each (you might have some left over depending on the size of your molds). Freeze 1 hour, then insert sticks and freeze until firm, at least 4 hours. Dip molds briefly in cold water to release pops.

name: 3-ingredient Ginger-peach Ice Cream Floats
instructions: Cook peaches in a large pot of boiling water for 1 minute, then submerge in ice water. Slip off skins. Slice into 1/4-inch wedges.
Bring peaches and 3 cups ginger beer to a boil in a medium saucepan over high heat. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until peaches are fork-tender, about 5 minutes. Let cool completely.

To assemble floats, divide peaches among tall glasses and pour 1 tablespoon poaching liquid over each; reserve remaining poaching liquid for another use. Top with 2 scoops of ice cream, then pour remaining 3 cups ginger beer over. Serve with spoons and straws.
Poached peaches can be prepared up to 3 days ahead. Transfer to an airtight container and chill.

name: 3-ingredient Gochujang Grilled Chicken Wings With Scallion
instructions: Pat wings very dry with paper towels. Toss wings, oil, 1 tsp. salt, and ½ tsp. pepper in a large bowl to coat.

Prepare a grill for two zones, medium and medium-high, or heat a grill pan over medium. Working in batches if necessary, grill wings over medium heat, turning occasionally, until skin is starting to brown and fat is rendering, about 12 minutes. Move wings to medium-high zone of grill or increase heat under grill pan to medium-high. Cook wings, moving to a cooler section of grill or reducing heat if they start to burn, until cooked through, an instant-read thermometer inserted into the flesh but not touching the bone registers 74°C, and skin is crisp and lightly charred, 5–10 minutes.
Meanwhile, whisk gochujang and ¼ cup hot water in a large bowl.
Transfer wings to bowl with gochujang and toss to coat. Transfer to a platter. Top with scallions, season with salt and pepper, and serve immediately.

name: 3-ingredient Grilled Steak, Pineapple, And Avocado Salad | Epicurious

ingredients.prep: peeled, cut into 1/2" rounds, center core removed, divided

instructions: Season steak with 1 tsp. salt and 1 tsp. pepper. Let sit at room temperature at least 1 hour.
Meanwhile, purée 1 pineapple round, 1/2 tsp. salt, and 2 Tbsp. water in a blender until smooth. Add 3 Tbsp. oil and blend until smooth; set aside.

Prepare a grill for medium-high heat or heat a grill pan over medium-high; oil grate or pan. Grill steaks and remaining pineapple rounds, turning occasionally, until pineapple is lightly charred and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of steak registers 49°C, 8–10 minutes for medium-rare (pineapple may take longer to cook than steak). Transfer steak to a cutting board. Let sit at least 15 minutes, then thinly slice. Transfer pineapple to a platter and tent with foil to keep warm.
Cut avocados in half crosswise around pit, then carefully peel off skin with your hands. Slice each half crosswise into 1/2" rings.
Arrange sliced steak and avocado on platter with pineapple. Drizzle with pineapple dressing; season with salt and pepper.

name: 3-ingredient Holiday Brie Bites

ingredients.item: Trader joe’s mini brie bites (or 10 miniature brie cheese rounds)s

instructions: Using 1½-inch cookie cutters or fruit and veggie cutters, carefully press the center of each Brie round to make a shape on top, then use a butter knife to remove the bloomy rind (¼–½ inch deep).
Dollop the jam evenly into the cutouts in the Brie rounds. Using a skewer or the end of a spoon, smooth and refine the jam filling.
Top 10 of the crackers with the Brie rounds. Arrange on a serving dish alongside the remaining 20 crackers.
Enjoy!

name: 3-ingredient Ice Cream French Toast
instructions: Preheat oven to 121°C. Pour ice cream into a large baking dish. Add bread, turn to coat, then let sit 3 minutes. Flip bread and continue to soak until saturated but not soggy, about 3 minutes more.

Heat 2 Tbsp. butter in a large skillet over medium. Using tongs, carefully lift 2 bread slices from custard, letting excess drip back into dish. Transfer to skillet in a single layer and cook until golden brown and the center of toast springs back when pressed, about 4 minutes per side. Transfer to a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet; keep warm in oven until ready to serve. Repeat with 2 Tbsp. butter and remaining bread. Top toasts with remaining 1 Tbsp. butter and serve.

name: 3-ingredient Mussels With White Wine And Pesto
instructions: Bring wine to a boil in a large pot. Add mussels, cover, return to a boil, then reduce heat and bring to a simmer. Cook mussels until they open, 3–4 minutes. Stir in pesto; season with salt and pepper.
Using a slotted spoon, divide mussels among bowls. Top evenly with broth and serve immediately.

name: 3-ingredient Oreo Balls
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Mix Oreo cookie crumbs and cream cheese together in a bowl; roll into balls and arrange on the prepared baking sheet. Freeze cookie balls until solid, about 1 hour.
Melt almond bark in the top of a double boiler over simmering water, stirring frequently and scraping down the sides with a rubber spatula to avoid scorching.

Dip cookie balls in the melted almond bark, removing balls using 2 forks to allow excess bark drip back into double boiler. Arrange coated cookie balls on the baking sheet; refrigerate until coating is firm, about 10 minutes.

name: 3-ingredient Oreo Mousse

ingredients.item: 170 g  bolachas oreo ou bolachas de chocolate com recheio de baunilha

instructions: Triture as bolachas e reserve-as. Bata as natas em chantili bem firme.
Envolva muito bem o chantili com o leite condensado e depois com as bolachas. Disponha numa taça, leve ao frio até solidificar e sirva com decoração a gosto.

name: 3-ingredient Peanut Butter Cups
instructions: Prepare a cupcake tin with 6 liners.
Stir peanut butter and powdered sugar together until smooth.
Spread 1 to 2 tablespoons of chocolate in the bottom of each cupcake liner.
Dollop 1 to 2 teaspoons of the peanut butter mixture on top of the chocolate.
Cover each dollop of peanut butter with more chocolate and smooth out the top.
Refrigerate for 1 hour or until chocolate has hardened.
Remove peanut butter cups from the liners.
Enjoy!

name: 3-ingredient Peppermint Rocky Road Candies

ingredients.item: Dark chocolate chips or chopped dark chocolate
Crushed peppermint candies or candy canes

instructions: Line 2 rimmed baking sheets with parchment or wax paper. Heat chocolate in a medium heatproof bowl set over a medium pot of barely simmering water (bottom of bowl should not touch water), stirring occasionally, or in short bursts in the microwave, stirring in between bursts, until chocolate is melted and smooth.

Fold marshmallows and 1/2 cup candies into chocolate until evenly combined. Drop heaping tablespoonfuls of chocolate mixture onto prepared baking sheets; sprinkle with remaining 1/4 cup candies. Chill until set, about 30 minutes. Serve at room temperature.
Candies can be made 5 days ahead; transfer to an airtight container and chill.

name: 3-ingredient Pina Colada
instructions: Combine pineapple, coconut milk, rum, and ice in a blender and puree until smooth and creamy.
Serve immediately.

name: 3-ingredient Red Velvet Strawberry Cheesecake Parfaits

ingredients.prep: (use milk instead of water and butter instead of oil when preparing)
(Set the crust mix aside as you won’t be using it. Prepare according to package directions)

instructions: Mix together red velvet cake mix and cook according to package directions. Cool completely to room temperature (1-2 hours) and cut into ½ -inch (1.2 cm) cubes. Set aside.
While the cake is baking, mix together cheesecake pie filling. Pour mix into a bowl and refrigerate for 1 hour or until it sets.
Slice 3 or 4 whole strawberries and set aside. Cut the remaining strawberries into quarters and set aside as well.
To assemble: fill the bottom inch of serving cups with red velvet cubes. Pipe or spoon another inch or so of cheesecake filling. Top with about 1 inch (2.5 cm) of cubed strawberries.
Repeat the layers again and top with 1 or 2 strawberry slices and chocolate hearts. Serve.
Enjoy!

name: 3-ingredient Seared Dates With Vanilla Ice Cream And Mint
instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium skillet over medium. Add dates and cook, turning often, until lightly browned on all sides, 4–6 minutes.
Divide dates among plates. Add a few small scoops of ice cream to each. Drizzle with oil, then top with mint; season with salt.

name: 3-ingredient Strawberry Icebox Cake
instructions: Spread a thin layer of whipped cream in a square glass baking dish.
Layer graham crackers on top, then cover with a layer of whipped cream.
Sprinkle ⅓ of the strawberries on top, then layer with cream again.
Repeat steps 2 and 3 until no more ingredients remain. (The top layer should be strawberries and should not be covered with cream.)
Refrigerate for at least 3 hours.
Enjoy!

name: 3-ingredient Swedish Meatballs
instructions: Combine frozen meatballs, condensed soup, and sour cream in a slow cooker.
Cover slow cooker. Cook on High until heated through, about 2 hours.

name: 3-ingredient Sweet And Smoky Brussels Sprouts
instructions: Cook bacon in a large skillet over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until partially crisped, 5–7 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer bacon to paper towels, reserving fat in skillet.

Add 2 Tbsp. oil to fat and heat over medium. Working in batches and adding more oil if needed, add brussels sprouts in a single layer, cut side down, and sear, without stirring, until well-browned, about 3 minutes. Season with salt, toss to coat, then stir in bacon and dates. Stir in 3/4 cup water, increase heat to medium-high, and cook, mashing dates with the back of a wooden spoon, until dates have dissolved and brussels sprouts are well-glazed, about 2 minutes.

name: 3-ingredient Whipped Cream
instructions: Place a medium bowl and mixer beaters into the freezer to chill, about 5 minutes.
Pour cream into the chilled bowl and beat with an electric mixer until frothy. Add sugar and vanilla gradually, continuing to beat until soft peaks form.

name: 3-layer Chocolate Delight
instructions: Demolhe as folhas de gelatina em água fria. Depois escorra-as e leve-as a derreter no micro-ondas sem deixar ferver. Reserve. Separe as claras das gemas. Leve ao lume um tacho com o leite, a farinha maisena e as gemas, mexendo sempre até engrossar.
Corte os chocolates e divida cada um por três taças diferentes.
Distribua a mistura do creme pelas 3 taças com o chocolate partido e mexa bem para que me dissolvam. Verta também a gelatina derretida pelas taças e envolva.
Em tigelas separadas bata as natas em chantilly bem firme e as claras em castelo.
Divida-as depois pelas taças com os cremes, como vê na foto.

Mexa bem, verta para uma forma uma camada até solificar. Repita o processo nas restantes.  A cobertura: leve ao lume em banho-maria as natas com o chocolate, depois de derretido, retire e mexa bem até ficar um creme. Retire a forma do frio, mergulhe-a em água morna, desenforme e sirva decorado com o creme de chocolate e as pepitas.

name: 3-minute Chocolate Cream Cheese Frosting

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Melt ¾ cup (125 g) chopped dark chocolate in a heat-proof non-metallic bowl in 30 second bursts in a microwave, stirring between each one, until smooth. (Alternatively, melt the chocolate in a medium heat-proof bowl set over, but not touching, a saucepan full of simmering water.) Stir in 3 Tbsp. Dutch-process cocoa powder and mix until smooth. Set aside.

Beat 8 oz. cream cheese, room temperature, and ½ cup (1 stick; 113g) unsalted butter, at room temperature, in a large bowl using an electric mixer, scraping down sides of mixing bowl as needed until completely incorporated and very smooth.

Add 2 cups (226g) powdered sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla extract, and ¾ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt and beat on low speed until completely incorporated. Add melted chocolate mixture and beat until combined and no streaks remain. Increase speed to medium and beat until slightly lighter in color and starting to become fluffy, about 30 seconds. Use right away, before the chocolate firms up.
Editor’s note: This recipe for chocolate cream cheese frosting is adapted from one that first appeared in the September 1999 issue of ‘Bon Appétit.’ Head this way for a round-up of our best chocolate cake recipes →

name: 30 Minute Tomato Sauce
instructions: In a pot over medium heat, add the olive oil, onion, garlic, and tomato paste. Cook for 5-7 minutes or until the tomato paste has caramelized.
Add the canned tomatoes, dried oregano, and dried basil. Reduce heat to a simmer and cook for 15-20 minutes or until the desired thickness.
Add salt and pepper to taste.
Enjoy!

name: 30-minute Burger
